title: Creative Blaze Cake Recipe
description: Adds a recipe to craft the creative blaze cake from the create mod in survival
body:
A datapack that adds a recipe to be able to craft the creative blaze cake from the create mod in survival. (requires create mod)

To craft the item:

4x Nether Stars, 4x Amethyst Shards, 1x Blaze Cake

![The recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d2fa7221e44d89e65e5caa8427cd3697705d879.png)
